ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjustment_factor" REAL /* Adjustment factor for the stock price */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock price data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock price data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the indicator belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the technical indicator data */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator */,
  "params" TEXT /* Parameters for the technical indicator */,
  "k_val" REAL /* K value of the technical indicator */,
  "d_val" REAL /* D value of the technical indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technical indicator data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technical indicator data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the access control applies to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the access control applies to */,
  "allow_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating read access */,
  "allow_write" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating write access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the analytics tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics tool was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics tool was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tool_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the access control applies to */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analytics tool the access control applies to */,
  "allow_use" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating use access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "tool_id")
)
